general.title: Z-Score Normalization [DMAP] [SPAC]
general.instructions:
Perform z-scores normalization for the selected data table in the analysis. Normalized data table is stored under name "z_scores".\
Please refer to DUET Documentation and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Table to Process
parameters.description: Source table to perform the computation. Original refers to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Output Table Name
parameters.description: Name of the table to be added to the analysis. Default is "z_scores".
